definition.en-US: The learner examined data, system behavior, or problem requirements to identify patterns, constraints, or performance characteristics relevant to a solution.
The learner applied a proposed method, algorithm, or approach to solve a problem or achieve a system objective, regardless of final success.
The learner assigned data instances to predefined categories or labels using rules, models, or machine learning techniques.
The learner examined multiple models, approaches, or results to identify differences in performance, behavior, or suitability for the problem.
The learner formulated mathematical expressions, algorithms, or logical relationships from existing principles or observed data.
The learner designed and built components, models, or software solutions forming part of an intelligent system.
The learner produced structured records describing system design, implementation decisions, processes, or results to support understanding, replication, or evaluation.
The learner assessed the performance of a model, approach, or solution using appropriate metrics, criteria, or validation techniques.
The learner translated algorithms, models, or system designs into executable code or operational system components.
The learner created abstract, mathematical, or computational representations of systems, environments, or data relationships to support analysis, prediction, or system design.
The learner defined objectives, methodologies, resources, and workflows required for intelligent system development or investigation.
The learner generated estimated outcomes or future values using data-driven models or computational inference methods.
The learner communicated system design, findings, or results using technical explanations, visualizations, or demonstrations to convey understanding or justify outcomes.
The learner critically evaluated system performance, decisions, or learning outcomes to identify improvements or insights.
The learner modified system components, models, or methodologies based on feedback, testing results, or evaluation findings.
The learner chose a dataset, feature set, algorithm, or approach from a set of alternatives based on problem requirements or evaluation criteria.
The learner verified data, model, or system performance and reliability through structured validation procedures, experiments, or datasets.
The learner adjusted model parameters or hyperparameters to improve performance based on evaluation results.
